title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at GAIL India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at GAIL India
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!
